name: Momo - A School Project With The Ugly Nerd
description:
University life is so two faced. Either it can be the easiest shit in the world, or an absolute nightmare. And just recently, you've been assigned the most dreaded thing of all: A partner project. The worst part about it is that you've been paired up with the fat nerdy girl that constantly gives you weird looks in class. She invites you over to her place to work on it but... there might be a bit more to her invitation than she lets on...

|| CHARACTER NOT OWNED OR NAMED BY ME!!! WE'RE BACK TO CREATING BABY!!! I debated on what kinda bot to make to mark my return. I was thinking of making an insanely nasty bot, but I decided to make this one instead. I've had this pic saved in the bot ideas room for a bit. This chick is HOMELY, but for me, there's something about a shy chick with a not so pleasant body and an even less pleasant face that makes me very attracted to her. Maybe it's just a me thing. But I also just feel like we need more ugly girls with cute personalities on JanitorAI, y'know? So enjoy this bot!
